infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: VaultNote needs access to your photos to attach images to notes. All images are stored locally on your device.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: VaultNote needs permission to save images to your photo library.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: VaultNote needs access to your microphone to record voice notes. All recordings are stored locally on your device.

plugins.microphonePermission: VaultNote needs access to your microphone to record voice notes.

plugins.photosPermission: VaultNote needs access to your photos to attach images to notes.
